campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staff recruitment and retention challenges, heard public input on various city matters, and reminded residents about the upcoming Boogie Festival this weekend.
keyTopics: Staff vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Boogie Festival happening this weekend
Public hearing on government code compliance
Home security concerns raised by residents

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 20, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council adopted a resolution to identify certain properties in Saratoga and scheduled a public hearing for June 17, 2026, where residents can voice concerns and the council will make a final decision on the matter.
keyTopics: Resolution adopted to identify designated properties
Public hearing scheduled for June 17, 2026
Residents invited to submit protests and feedback

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council held a meeting on June 2, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, confirm a youth commissioner appointment, and handle several administrative decisions. Key votes included calling for a municipal election in November, approving a housing development map, and authorizing the town manager to sign agreements for software services and building inspections.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 general municipal election scheduled
New youth commissioner confirmed by selection committee
Tract 10675 Boulevard housing development final map approved
Five-year software agreement authorized with Accela, Inc.
Building division plan check services agreements authorized

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 10, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize upcoming agendas for June 16 and June 23, 2026. They reviewed which items to add to the schedules, determined which discussions needed specific time slots, and checked waiver requirements for agenda items. The Council also discussed the Community and Economic Development Committee's work plan.
keyTopics: June 16 Final Agenda items and scheduling
June 23 Draft Agenda planning and additions
Community and Economic Development Committee Work Plan
Waiver requirements for agenda items and documents

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 9, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on June 9, 2026, to handle a private personnel matter regarding the City Attorney position, followed by a public session where they recognized Pride Month and Juneteenth with official proclamations.
keyTopics: Closed-door discussion about hiring or appointing a new City Attorney
Pride Month proclamation
Juneteenth proclamation

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 2, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: Sunnyvale's City Council held a special meeting on June 2, 2026 to swear in board and commission members, recognize public safety achievements, celebrate LGBTQ+ Pride Month, and approve several city contracts and payments. The council authorized spending for a traffic signal project on Sunnyvale Avenue/California Avenue, approved a chemical supply purchase for city operations, and allocated funds to support the local Chamber of Commerce's Art and Wine Festival.
keyTopics: Traffic signal improvements on Sunnyvale Avenue/California Avenue ($1.07 million contract)
New board and commission member swearing-in ceremony
Public Safety Department special awards and military equipment annual report
City support for Sunnyvale Chamber of Commerce Art and Wine Festival (up to $6,000 for traffic control)

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 15, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a closed-door meeting with legal counsel to discuss an anticipated lawsuit that the city may initiate. The council also reviewed what was discussed in that private session and reminded residents about lobbying registration requirements.
keyTopics: One pending litigation case city is preparing to file
Lobbying registration and reporting rules under city ordinance

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 9, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on June 9, 2026, using both in-person and remote participation options. Residents could attend via Zoom or phone, and submit written comments online before the meeting.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format allows in-person and remote attendance
Public can join via Zoom or phone
Written public comments accepted through eComment system on City Council Agenda page

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — June 9, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve the city's spending plan for 2026-27 and discuss water management rules. They also reviewed updates to city policies on preventing water contamination and making government more open to the public.
keyTopics: 2026-27 city budget approval
2025 urban water management plan
Water shortage response strategy
Backflow prevention and water safety requirements
Open governance policy changes

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — June 12, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to move the community toward electric vehicles and renewable energy. They reviewed design guidelines for a new public EV charging hub grant program and gathered feedback on community-wide electrification strategies to guide future city decisions.
keyTopics: Community-wide electrification strategies and future planning
Design guidelines for public EV charging hub grant program
CEQA environmental review status for the EV charging project
